hero.title: History that builds.
hero.subtitle: More than 65 years shaping Tijuana's future. Quality education that transforms lives.

history.title: Our History
history.content: When Tijuana needed a school that believed in the power of education, we were born with a clear vision: to build professionals with purpose.
history.today: Today, more than 65 generations later, we continue to evolve while honoring our roots.
history.partner: Since 2022, our partnership with Grupo Ferdel brings STEAM methodologies and innovation to our proven educational model.

official.title: Official Accreditation
official.description: SEP recognition for all our programs

career.title: Career Focused
career.description: Degrees designed for today's job market

practical.title: Practical Learning
practical.description: Real skills for your future career

location.title: Central Location
location.description: Easy access in the heart of Tijuana

programs.title: Educational Programs
programs.subtitle: Programs that prepare for the future

preparatoria.name: Technological High School
preparatoria.description: Excellence in academic training with focus on science, technology, and engineering. Prepare for university or enter the workforce with solid skills.

administracion.name: Administration
administracion.description: Develop leadership and business management skills. Learn to manage resources, teams, and projects with strategic vision.

contabilidad.name: Accounting
contabilidad.description: Master finance and taxation. Become an essential professional for any organization.

experience.title: The Sor Juana Experience
experience.subtitle: A community that supports your growth
experience.description: Small classes. Individual attention. A clear path to university or directly to your career. Come discover why thousands of families trust us.

1.title: Initial Contact
1.description: Request information or schedule a visit

2.title: Interview
2.description: Meet our team and ask questions

cost.question: What is the tuition cost?
cost.answer: Contact us for detailed information about tuition and payment options.

location.question: Where is the school located?
location.answer: We are in a central location in Tijuana, easy to access from anywhere in the city.

schedule.question: What are the school hours?
schedule.answer: Our hours are Monday through Friday, with full days that prepare students for academic success.

transport.question: Do you offer transportation?
transport.answer: Contact us to learn about transportation options available in your area.

food.question: Do you have food service?
food.answer: We offer healthy and balanced meal options for students.

cta.title: Start your child's story here
cta.subtitle: Join the next generation of Sor Juana students. Limited spaces available for the next school year.
